# Auto-generated for non-Poetry deployment targets (HF Spaces, Render,
# Fly.io fallback path). Mirrors ``poetry export --with ui``.
#
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND. Regenerate after any pyproject.toml change with:
#     poetry export --without-hashes --with ui --format requirements.txt \
#         --output requirements.txt
#
# The canonical install path for development + container builds remains
# Poetry (see Dockerfile builder stage). This file exists so deploy
# targets that don't speak Poetry can still install from a frozen
# lockfile snapshot.
